summary: A near-static graphic card: 'CBP SECURES THE GAMES' over a stock stadium image with a soccer ball and the CBP seal, framed in colorful FIFA World Cup 2026 branding. No audio, no motion narrative — an informational social graphic, not a produced music-driven video.
notable_text: CBP SECURES THE GAMES; FIFA WORLD CUP 2026; U.S. Customs and Border Protection; #WeAre26 #FIFAWorldCup #USHostsTheWorld
